title: agrostis reuteri subsp. reuteri
intro: Agrostis reuteri subsp. reuteri, also known as Agrostis reuteri or blue bent grass, is a type of grass plant belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Agrostis reuteri subsp. reuteri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
